title: Lungdam Ni A’ding Na Kithawi Hiam?

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung panin vangliatna tawh Topa hong paikik ding hun,
Lei le van mi a thei kuamah omlo
Mi siangthote’n Amah dawnin a mite hong sam dinga,
Tua ni ciang pengkul awging kiza ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mitphiat kal tomno khat sungin i kikhel khinta ding a,
Amah ite’n Amah suun ding van pan hong kumsuk dinga,
zingsang zong hi thei ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I mawhna si bang a san hang Kalvary pan hong
Singlamteh liimnuai-ah damna va zuan ni;
Amah’n eite hong kem den a, vuk bang in hong
Meiipi tung tuangin hong paisuk kik ding hi.
